title: Yazılım Mühendisliği (İngilizce) Bölümü - Öğrenci Görüşleri
content:
Choosing to study Software Engineering at Istanbul Esenyurt University is a proud decision I’ve made for my academic and professional future. What drew me to this program was its strong emphasis on practical, industry relevant skills combined with a forward thinking curriculum. I was particularly impressed by the university’s commitment to staying up to date with the latest advancements in technology, ensuring that students are well prepared for the rapidly evolving tech industry.

The hands on approach to learning through lab sessions and real world projects was a major factor in my decision. Additionally, the faculty members are not only knowledgeable but also deeply invested in student success, offering mentorship and guidance beyond the classroom. The university’s modern facilities, research opportunities, and active student tech community further convinced me that this was the right place to build my career in software engineering.

Now that I’ve entered in my third year, I can confidently say that my experience has exceeded my expectations. I am proud to be part of Istanbul Esenyurt University’s Software Engineering program and excited for what lies ahead!

Iqra Sarvar

2nd Year, Software Engineering
